requestedOutcome: Remove intermittent admin-console stalls without changing billing, routing, payment, or public API behavior.
goal: Remove intermittent admin-console stalls without changing billing, routing, payment, or public API behavior.
successEvidence: Bounded user-list SQL calls; one-query dashboard leaderboards; single-flight analytics cache; warm provider page avoids all-history scans; admin timing headers; passing regressions.
stopCondition: Done when all planned tests and checks pass; otherwise stop as blocked, needs-verification, or scope-exceeded before schema or production changes.
nonGoals: No database schema, persistent rollup, deployment, or production mutation.
scope: Admin read-path performance in billing lists, dashboard leaderboards, operating analytics, provider-channel statistics, UI pagination, and request timing.
riskHints: Preserve billing serialization and admin response compatibility; no schema or live-state mutation.
